pages.title: Sunlight Vulnerability
pages.text: Vampire maids are vulnerable to sunlight, just like vampires from the Vampirism mod.$(br2)When exposed to direct sunlight (no blocks above, during daytime, not raining), vampire maids will take periodic damage.$(br2)The damage amount and frequency can be configured in the mod settings.$(br2)$(bold)Sunscreen Protection:$() If the Vampirism sunscreen buff is active on the maid, she will be immune to sun damage. This can be toggled in the configuration.
